name: Outstanding Steak Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1/4 pound butter in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add 3 ounces Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 ounce garlic paste, 1 teaspoon garlic salt, and a dash of pepper to the melted butter.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Place steaks in a shallow dish or resealable plastic bag and pour the marinade over the steaks.
5. Cover the steaks with the marinade and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, allowing the marinade to congeal on the meat.
Makes enough for 2 steaks.
